overall.description: First-person perspective inside a futuristic cyberpunk subway train at night, featuring neon green interior lighting, seated passengers, and rapidly passing cityscape visible through the window. The clip appears to be from a video game with high-fidelity graphics and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic subway train interior with green neon lighting

agents.ego_description: sitting on a train seat next to a window, observing the passing urban landscape and neon-lit cityscape

notable_agents.action: woman with long dark hair wearing a plaid shirt and pink pants, sitting quietly and looking forward

entered.detail: large rectangular window showing rapidly passing futuristic city buildings with neon lights
vertical support pole with bright green neon illumination running along its length
female passenger with long dark hair in a plaid shirt sitting immediately next to the camera
dark metallic flooring reflecting the green neon lighting from above
futuristic skyscrapers and urban structures with illuminated windows passing by at high speed

segments.scene_description: The camera sits stationary inside a futuristic subway car bathed in green neon light, facing a window that reveals a blur of cyberpunk city architecture passing by. A woman with long dark hair sits quietly in the adjacent seat, while other passengers are visible seated further down the car.

scene_state.functional_zone: train interior near exit doors with standing passengers

events.description: camera pans left to reveal the opposite side of the train car, showing standing passengers and the exit door

agents.ego_description: turning to survey the other passengers and the interior layout of the train car

notable_agents.action: woman standing near the train door holding onto an overhead rail for support

entered.detail: glass and metal train door with green neon framing at the end of the car
female passenger standing and holding a pole near the exit door
illuminated digital advertisement display showing PHANTOM text above the door
row of seats on the opposite side of the train car with seated passengers

segments.scene_description: As the camera pans left, the view shifts from the window to the interior of the train car, revealing a standing passenger near the door and a digital sign reading PHANTOM. The previously visible woman and cityscape move out of frame, while the green neon poles now appear on the right side of the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from a view of a passing cyberpunk cityscape to the interior details of a neon-lit subway car. It begins stationary, looking through a window at the blur of futuristic architecture while a woman with long dark hair sits quietly in the adjacent seat. As the camera pans left, the cityscape and the seated woman glide out of frame, transitioning the focus toward the train's inner cabin. The scene then opens up to reveal a standing passenger near the door and a digital sign reading PHANTOM, while green neon poles shift into view on the right.
